lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਕਲਿਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eis kalijug meh karam dharam na koee |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, no one is interested in good karma, or Dharmic faith.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਕੋ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam binaa ko mukat na hoee |4|10|30|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, no one is liberated. ||4||10||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲੀ ਕਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਚੰਡਾਲ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kalee kaa janam chanddaal kai ghar hoee |
lines.english: This Dark Age was born in the house of evil.
True is the Lord King, True is His Royal Command.
Those whose minds are attuned to the True,
Gauree, Third Mehl, Gwaarayree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਜਪਹੁ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਉਤਰਹੁ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam japahu bhavajal utarahu paar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Lord's Name, and cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Listen, O my mind: contemplate the Word of the Shabad.
Carefree Lord enter the True Mansion of His Presence, and merge in the True Name. ||1||
The self-willed manmukh does not remember the Lord; he continues coming and going in reincarnation. ||2||
This world is born out of the love of duality.
In doubt he comes, and in doubt he goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਖਟੇ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mahaa dukh khatte birathaa janam gavaaeaa |3|
lines.english: It earns only terrible pain, and this life is lost in vain. ||3||
This soul is enjoined to the service of someone else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾ ਕਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap bhulaa ki prabh aap bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: Does he himself go astray, or does God lead him astray?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੇਤੇ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eko naam chete vichahu bharam chukaae |
lines.english: Remembering the One Name, doubt is cast out from within.
Granting His Grace, He leads us to meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੇ ਨਾਉ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam jape naau nau nidh paae |4|11|31|
lines.english: O Nanak, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the nine treasures of the Name are obtained. ||4||11||31||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਪੂਛਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa guramukh dhiaaeaa tin poochhau jaae |
lines.english: Go and ask the Gurmukhs, who meditate on the Lord.
Serving the Guru, the mind is satisfied.
Those who earn the Lord's Name are wealthy.
Through the Perfect Guru, understanding is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਘਾਲ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sevaa har ghaal thaae paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs serve the Lord, and so they are accepted. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavai mat aootam hoe |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the intellect becomes pure and sublime,
Those who recognize the self - their minds become pure.
They become Jivan-mukta, liberated while yet alive, and they find the Lord.
In egotism and Maya, they are eating toxic poison.
In the love of duality, no one can serve the Lord.
and they are easily and intuitively absorbed in the Lord. ||2||
The blind, self-willed manmukhs come and go in reincarnation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam devai jan soe |
lines.english: Those, unto whom the Lord bestows His Name,
They are emotionally attached to their children, family and home.
Worship Him night and day, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
O Nanak, they are absorbed in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||12||32||
How rare are those who understand the Guru's Teachings!

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੁਟੁ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: akhutt naam dhan har tott na hoee |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Name is inexhaustible; it shall never be exhausted.
The Guru's service has been performed throughout the four ages.
Very few are those perfect ones who do this good deed.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sevaa amrit ras peejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who serve, drink in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aithai sadaa sukh dar sobhaa hoee |1|
lines.english: In this world, it brings a constant peace, and at the Lord's Gate, it brings honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: e man mere bharam na keejai |
lines.english: O my mind, have no doubt about this.
They save themselves, and they redeem all their generations as well.
Those who serve the True Guru are the greatest people of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖਹਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam rakheh ur dhaare |
lines.english: They keep the Name of the Lord clasped tightly to their hearts.
Serving the True Guru, the mind becomes humble forever.
Attuned to the Naam, they cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||
Egotism is subdued, and the heart-lotus blossoms forth.
Attuned to the Naam, they remain detached within their own home. ||3||
The Unstruck Melody vibrates, as they dwell within the home of the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh tin kee sachee baanee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, their words are true.
Night and day, they meditate on the Lord, the Sustainer of the Earth.
Throughout the ages, the devotees chant and repeat these words.
